announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) Agentic AI Hackathon - SF
announcements.body: 8-Hour Hackathon at **AWS Builder Loft, SF** on June 5, 2026. Join us for an electrifying hackathon bringing together developers and AI enthusiasts. Sponsored by RocketRide, XTrace, vnovate, butterbase, Juspay & Photon.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Launch Party
announcements.body: Join us for the big **RocketRide Launch Party** on June 18, 2026 at **The Shack, San Francisco**. Come celebrate the launch with the team!

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide × MiniMax
announcements.body: We're teaming up with **MiniMax**! 🚀 Their **M3** open-weights model brings three frontier capabilities into one — agentic coding, 1M-context sparse attention, and native multimodality. It's **live today** as a node in our open-source inventory: drop it into a visual pipeline, benchmark it side-by-side against other frontier models in minutes, and trace every step with full observability. Pair M3's token efficiency with RocketRide's cost observability and aggregated cloud inference to run the best model for each task at the lowest cost. 💻
announcements.discord_content:
Hello @everyone <:RocketRideiconWhite:1512204346182340728>

We're teaming up with MiniMax! 🚀

Their M3 open-weights model brings three frontier capabilities into one:
⚡ Agentic coding
🧠 1M-context sparse attention
🖼️ Native multimodality

It's live today — we've added a MiniMax node to our open-source inventory, now updated for M3. Drop it into a visual pipeline, benchmark it side-by-side against other frontier models in minutes, and trace every step with full observability.

Pair M3's token efficiency with RocketRide's cost observability and aggregated cloud inference to run the best model for each task at the lowest cost.

👉 Read more: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/rocketride-ai_introducing-minimax-m3-the-first-open-weights-activity-7467716002383032320-NQVW

announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) Harness Engineering, Live
announcements.body: At **SCALE Demo Day** (GMI Cloud Cohort 1X NVIDIA), co-founder **Joe Maionchi** brought a pipeline up in **under 30 seconds** — fully offline, on a **C++ runtime** with **64 threads running in parallel**. 🚀 The argument: every agentic harness today is closed, vendor-locked, and charges you per call. RocketRide is the open AI harness for all of it — any model, any agent, any tool — and since it's open source, you own the runtime.
